name: PluginBase.CoordinateSystemType
summary: Defines the coordinate system type for model plug-ins which are using points as an input.

enum_values.name: FROM_FIRST_POINT_AND_GLOBAL
enum_values.summary: Plugin coordinate system is calculated from first input point defining the origin and global coordinates which defines x and y-direction.

enum_values.name: FROM_FIRST_AND_SECOND_POINT
enum_values.summary: Plugin coordinate system is calculated from first input point defining the origin and second input point which defines x-direction.
